For locale "ar" (Arabic) the following quantities should also be defined: `few` (e.g. "3"), `many` (e.g. "11"), `two` (e.g. "2"), `zero` (e.g. "0")
For locale "es" (Spanish) the following quantity should also be defined: `many`
For locale "fr" (French) the following quantity should also be defined: `many` (e.g. "1000000 de jours")
For locale "it" (Italian) the following quantity should also be defined: `many`
For locale "pt" (Portuguese) the following quantity should also be defined: `many`
For locale "pl" (Polish) the following quantities should also be defined: `few` (e.g. "2 miesiące"), `many` (e.g. "5 miesięcy")

issue.errorLine1: <string name="onboarding_library_album_grid_desc">Display albums in grid layout for better visual browsing</string>
<string name="onboarding_library_artist_grid_desc">Display artists in grid layout with profile pictures</string>
<string name="onboarding_library_show_lyrics_desc">Display synchronized lyrics in the player screen</string>
<string name="onboarding_rhythm_guard_desc">Set up Rhythm Guard to keep your listening safer with age-aware defaults and manual protection controls.</string>
<string name="onboarding_rhythm_guard_age_hint">Age profile helps Rhythm Guard recommend safer listening limits.</string>
<string name="onboarding_rhythm_guard_tip_1">Auto mode applies safer defaults with minimal setup.</string>
<string name="onboarding_rhythm_guard_tip_2">You can tune alerts and break reminders later in Settings.</string>
<string name="onboarding_rhythm_guard_tip_3">Manual mode gives you full control over warnings and thresholds.</string>
<string name="onboarding_full_tour_prompt_desc">Core setup is done. Continue for advanced customization, or finish now and explore the rest later from Settings.</string>
<string name="onboarding_full_tour_prompt_tip_1">Full tour includes playback, theme, gesture, and media scan options.</string>
<string name="onboarding_full_tour_prompt_tip_2">You can reopen onboarding anytime from Settings > Developer & Debugging.</string>
<string name="onboarding_full_tour_prompt_tip_3">Nothing here is permanent. All choices can be changed later.</string>
<string name="onboarding_permission_tip_1">Grant all permissions for the best experience</string>
<string name="onboarding_permission_tip_2">You can change permissions later in Settings</string>
<string name="onboarding_permission_tip_3">Rhythm respects your privacy and data</string>

<string name="onboarding_notifications_desc">Control how Rhythm displays music playback in your notification shade. Choose between custom styled notifications or the standard system media controls.</string>
<string name="onboarding_custom_notifications_desc">Use Rhythm\'s enhanced notification design with additional controls and styling</string>
<string name="onboarding_notification_tip_1">See current track info at a glance</string>
<string name="onboarding_gestures_desc">Navigate your music library faster with intuitive swipe and tap gestures. Customize gestures for the mini player and full player screens.</string>
<string name="onboarding_gesture_swipe_desc">Swipe left/right on mini player to skip tracks</string>
<string name="onboarding_gesture_dismiss_desc">Swipe down on full player to return to mini player</string>
<string name="onboarding_gesture_tracks_desc">Swipe on artwork to skip to next/previous song</string>
<string name="onboarding_gesture_doubletap_desc">Double tap album art to like the current song</string>
<string name="onboarding_gesture_tip_1">Swipe gestures work in both directions</string>
<string name="onboarding_gesture_tip_2">Quick swipes respond faster than slow ones</string>
<string name="onboarding_widgets_desc">Add Rhythm widgets to your launcher for quick music control. Customize what information is displayed and how the widget looks.</string>
<string name="onboarding_widget_artist_desc">Display the current artist in the widget</string>
<string name="onboarding_widget_album_desc">Display the album title in the widget</string>
<string name="onboarding_widget_tip_1">Tap the widget to open the app</string>
<string name="onboarding_widget_tip_2">Resize widgets for different layouts (2x1 to 5x5)</string>
<string name="onboarding_widget_tip_3">Widgets update in real-time during playback</string>

<string name="onboarding_integrations_desc">Enhance your listening experience by connecting to external services. Get album art, lyrics, scrobble your plays, and share what you\'re listening to.</string>
<string name="onboarding_integration_ytmusic_desc">Access metadata and recommendations from YouTube Music</string>
<string name="onboarding_integration_spotify_desc">Fetch album art and metadata from Spotify</string>
<string name="onboarding_integration_discord_desc">Show what you\'re listening to on Discord</string>

<string name="onboarding_integrations_info_desc">These features send limited data (song titles, artists) to external services. Your personal data and music files stay on your device. You can enable or disable these at any time in Settings.</string>
<string name="onboarding_stats_desc">Discover insights about your music habits. Track your listening time, most played songs, favorite artists, and more with beautiful visualizations.</string>
<string name="onboarding_stats_show_home_desc">Display a listening stats widget on your home screen</string>
<string name="onboarding_stats_rating_desc">Rate your songs to track favorites and build smart playlists</string>
<string name="onboarding_stats_feature_1">Track total listening time by day, week, or month</string>

<string name="onboarding_stats_info_desc">Stats are calculated locally on your device based on your playback history. No data is sent to external servers. Access detailed stats anytime from the home screen or settings.</string>
<string name="settings_tip_gestures">Control playback faster with intuitive swipes and taps, no extra menus needed.</string>
<string name="settings_tip_gestures_swipe">Swipe up on mini player to open full player, then swipe down to dismiss when done.</string>
<string name="settings_tip_gestures_artwork">Swipe artwork to switch tracks and double tap album art for quick play or pause.</string>
<string name="settings_tip_rhythm_guard_off">Protect your hearing by enabling Rhythm Guard</string>
<string name="settings_tip_rhythm_guard_auto">Rhythm Guard automatically manages safe listening limits</string>
<string name="settings_tip_rhythm_guard_manual">You are manually controlling Rhythm Guard limits</string>
<string name="settings_keep_screen_on_lyrics_desc">Prevent screen from turning off while lyrics are visible</string>
<string name="scrobbling_desc">Send playback info to Last.fm, Pano Scrobbler, and compatible apps</string>
<string name="scrobbling_info_desc">This allows you to track your listening history, discover new music, and share your music taste with friends.</string>

<string name="scrobbling_apps_list">• Last.fm for Android
• Pano Scrobbler
• Simple Last.fm Scrobbler
• Other SLS API compatible apps</string>
<string name="scrobbling_setup_steps">1. Install a scrobbling app (e.g., Pano Scrobbler from F-Droid)\n2. Enable scrobbling here\n3. Your listening activity will be automatically tracked!</string>
<string name="discord_desc">Show what you\'re listening to in your Discord status</string>
<string name="discord_info_desc">Shows song title, artist, album, and playback progress.</string>
<string name="discord_apps_list">• Discord for Android\n• Discord must be running\n• Music status must be enabled in Discord settings</string>

<string name="discord_setup_steps">1. Install Discord for Android
2. Enable this setting in Rhythm
3. Open Discord and enable "Display current activity" in User Settings → Activity Status
4. Your now playing info will appear in your Discord status!</string>
<string name="discord_privacy_desc">Only broadcasts when music is playing. You can toggle this on/off anytime. Discord controls who can see your activity status.</string>
<string name="broadcast_status_desc">Send playback info to Tasker, KWGT, and automation apps</string>

<string name="broadcast_status_info_desc">Status broadcasting sends standard Android music player intents that automation and widget apps listen for. This allows third-party apps to display your now playing info or trigger automations based on what you\'re listening to.</string>

<string name="broadcast_apps_list">• Tasker (automation)
• KWGT/KLWP (Kustom widgets)
• MacroDroid
• AutoApps
• Zooper Widget
• Any app that listens to music player intents</string>

<string name="broadcast_setup_steps">1. Install your automation/widget app (e.g., Tasker, KWGT)
2. Enable this setting
3. Configure your app to listen for:
 • com.android.music.metachanged (track changes)
 • com.android.music.playstatechanged (play/pause)
4. Access song data via standard intents!</string>

<string name="broadcast_use_cases_list">• Display now playing in custom widgets
• Trigger smart home scenes based on music
• Auto-pause music when certain apps open
• Log your listening history
• Control other apps based on playback state</string>
<string name="replay_gain_desc">Use embedded replay gain tags for volume</string>
<string name="settings_select_option_desc">Choose a setting from the list to configure</string>
<string name="lyrics_embed_failed">Failed to embed lyrics in file</string>
